title: Gentle Nourishment
subtitle: Supporting your body step by step
description: As your body continues to adjust, maintaining simple and regular nourishment becomes important. Even small, consistent meals can help support your energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Nutritional needs continue to adjust gradually
You may begin to notice mild changes in appetite
Consistency in meals becomes more important than quantity
nutrition_focus: Include a mix of grains, proteins, and vegetables
recommended_foods: Whole grains like roti, rice, and oats
Fresh fruits like banana, apple, and papaya
Vegetables including लौकी (bottle gourd), carrots, and spinach
Protein sources like lentils, curd, and eggs (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like coconut water, buttermilk, or lemon water
reassurance: Simple, regular meals can gently support your body as it adjusts.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining balanced meals can help support stable energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Steady and balanced eating patterns can help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Continuing to include iron-rich foods supports your strength and energy.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nourishment helps build your energy gradually.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and reduced salt intake can support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Simple and consistent meals support a balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining a steady and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
nutrition_focus: Maintain a balanced intake of nutrients
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps your body stay balanced and steady.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: Managing multiple dietary needs becomes easier with simple, regular, and balanced meals.
priority_nutrition: Focus on whole and minimally processed foods
Avoid skipping meals or sudden changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent choices can support your overall well-being.
